covid_treatment: FWL partial-out Q1+Q2 2020 for VAR; excluded 2020-2021 for poverty regression

gdp_1pp.note: Stable across sub-periods. Two outliers (2009: Juntos social transfers; 2022: K-shaped post-COVID recovery) are interpretable. No structural break.

rate_100bp.source: Cholesky VAR(1), T=85, FWL COVID Q1+Q2
rate_100bp.note: Point estimate literature-consistent (-0.20 to -0.30 range) but 90% bootstrap CI includes zero at all horizons h=0..8. Normal for T=85 quarterly VAR with R2_GDP=0.056.

rate_100bp_chained.note: Chained: -0.195 × -0.656 = +0.128pp poverty per 100bp rate hike. Both components have uncertainty; Cholesky CI includes zero.

fx_10pct.source: LP OLS h=1 HAC, T=82, lp_elasticities.json
fx_10pct.note: Significant at 90% level. 10% FX depreciation → +0.237pp CPI impact at h=1 quarter. CI excludes zero: [+0.030, +0.443].
